successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType with values ANNUAL, SICK, and EMERGENCY; LeaveRequestStatus with values PENDING, APPROVED, and REJECTED; and the LeaveRequest interface containing id, employeeId, leaveType, and status.

src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports LeaveRequestRepository with methods create(request: LeaveRequest): Promise<void>, findById(id: string): Promise<LeaveRequest | null>, and updateStatus(id: string, status: LeaveRequestStatus): Promise<void>.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports PgLeaveRequestRepository as the PostgreSQL-facing repository contract implementation type that operates on LeaveRequest model types.
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.contract.spec.ts exists, uses Vitest, and validates LeaveRequest type definitions and repository contract usage compile and behave as defined.
All imports between the leave model, repository contract, and test files resolve using only artifacts created in this phase and compile under TypeScript.
Project architecture documentation is updated to record LeaveType values (ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY) and LeaveRequestStatus states (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).

constraints: Limit scope to type definitions, DTO/types, repository interfaces, PostgreSQL-facing repository contracts, and unit tests only.
Repository pattern: all database access must be represented through repository interfaces; do not introduce direct database access.
Use canonical LeaveRequest attributes: id, employeeId, leaveType, and status.
Repository contracts must consume and return types defined in src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts.
No API endpoints, services, persistence logic, or business workflow implementation may be added in this phase.
Follow TypeScript compilation compatibility for all imports and exported contracts.
Audit record implementation is not part of this phase, but future state-changing operations must support audit recording per platform standards.
No sensitive data should be logged if any test or placeholder implementation includes logging.
outOfScope: AuditRecord domain model and repository contracts.
API routes, controllers, RBAC enforcement, and input validation endpoints.
Employee domain model and repository contracts.
Leave balance and leave policy models or repositories.
Notification models, repositories, or processing services.
Database schema migrations, SQL execution logic, or repository method implementations beyond contract definitions.
Any files outside the leave model, leave repository contracts, related unit tests, and architecture documentation update required by this phase.
